visual_summary: Table.story is a table story UI component from the mantine corpus. It provides reusable table behavior and styling for React or web UI screens.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready table component with the following characteristics:

Name: Table.story
Description: Table.story is a table story UI component from the mantine corpus. It provides reusable table behavior and styling for React or web UI screens.
Style: utility-styled
Interactions: 
Tags: mantine, story, table

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
// packages/@mantine/core/src/components/Table/Table.story.tsx
import { Stack } from '../Stack';
import { Text } from '../Text';
import { Title } from '../Title';
import { Table } from './Table';

  { position: 39, mass: 88.906, symbol: 'Y', name: 'Yttrium' },
